content: Latest clean main at 1e380c4 is ready for judging: node tests 21/21, tests.html PASS via file://, index.html opens via file:// with no console errors. Your prior browser checklist plus the merged #602/#604 fixes cover the remaining evidence gaps.

**Henry:** Re-verified PR #602 against latest main after #601 landed: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/602. It remains useful and clean; only changes are value-bearing gridcell labels for interaction evidence plus a formula fix so quoted `#REF!` stays literal. Evidence: 17/17 Node tests pass, browser tests PASS, app opens via file:// with no console errors.
